name: HRT_CONTENT_ITEM_RD_VL
query: SELECT RD.CONTENT_RATING_DESC_ID, RD.CONTENT_TYPE_ID, RD.CONTENT_ITEM_ID, RD.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, RDTL.REVIEW_RATING_DESCR, RD.RATING_LEVEL_ID, RD.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, RD.MODULE_ID, RD.CREATED_BY, RD.CREATION_DATE, RD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, RD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, RD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_CONTENT_ITEM_RDESC_B RD, HRT_CONTENT_ITEM_RDSC_TL RDTL WHERE RD.CONTENT_RATING_DESC_ID = RDTL.CONTENT_RATING_DESC_ID AND RDTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
